title: Sign up with valid credentials
description: Verify that a new user can successfully sign up with valid email and password and receive confirmation of account creation.

steps.description: Navigate to the sign-up page
Input a valid email address and a strong password
Submit the sign-up form
Check that the user is registered and redirected to the home or profile page
Verify that a session is created and user is marked as signed in

title: Sign in with correct credentials
description: Check that existing users can sign in with valid email and password and maintain session state.

steps.description: Navigate to sign-in page
Enter registered email and correct password
Click the sign-in button
Confirm successful login and redirection to home view
Verify the session persists on page reload

title: Sign in failure with invalid credentials
description: Ensure that sign-in fails when using incorrect email or password and relevant error is displayed.

steps.description: Navigate to sign-in page
Enter unregistered email or incorrect password
Click the sign-in button
Verify error message indicating invalid credentials is shown
Ensure user is not logged in or redirected

title: Persistent user session across visits
description: Check that once logged in, user session persists on browser close and reopen without requiring re-login.

steps.description: Sign in with valid credentials
Close browser window and reopen the application URL
Verify user is still signed in and authorized views accessible

title: Display all Home View elements
description: Verify that Home View shows scan entry points, plant doctor shortcut, weekly stats, and recent scans carousel.

steps.description: Navigate to the home page after logging in
Check that the scan plant entry buttons are visible and clickable
Verify that the plant doctor shortcut is present
Confirm weekly stats are displayed accurately
Ensure recent scans carousel shows past identified plants

title: Camera capture flow for plant identification
description: Test the process of capturing an image via camera to trigger plant identification analysis.

steps.description: From Home View, initiate camera capture for plant identification
Allow camera permissions if prompted
Capture a clear image of a plant
Submit image for AI identification
Verify that analyzing/loading screen is shown
Confirm plant identification results are displayed with details and care information

title: Image upload for plant diagnosis
description: Verify user can upload a plant image from device storage for health diagnosis and receive correct AI results.

steps.description: From Home View, select upload option for plant diagnosis
Upload a valid plant image file
Submit image for AI diagnosis
Ensure analyzing/loading animation is visible
Validate the diagnosis view shows health status and treatment recommendations

title: Handle AI service error during identification
description: Check that application properly handles failures from the AI plant identification service and displays user-friendly error messages.

steps.description: Simulate AI service returning an error during image analysis
Submit a plant image for identification
Confirm error state is handled gracefully with an informative message
Verify that user can retry or cancel the operation

title: Save identified plant to personal collection
description: Verify the process of saving a plant from the identification result to the user's collection with backend synchronization.

steps.description: Complete an AI plant identification and arrive at the result view
Click the 'Save to Collection' button
Verify that the plant is added to the user's collection and persists in the backend
Navigate to the Collection View
Confirm the newly saved plant is visible in the collection list

title: View and delete plant from collection
description: Check that users can view details of saved plants and delete them, with changes reflected on backend and UI updates.

steps.description: Navigate to Collection View
Select a plant item to view its details
Verify detailed plant info is displayed correctly
Use the delete option to remove the plant from collection
Confirm plant is removed from the list and backend database

title: Navigation bar routing and active view highlighting
description: Validate that bottom navigation bar routes correctly between Home, Explore, Community, Assistant, and Profile views and highlights the active route.

steps.description: At any screen, click on each navigation tab one by one
Verify application navigates to corresponding views without error
Check that the selected navigation item is visually highlighted

title: Explore View shows scan history and allows result navigation
description: Test that the Explore View lists past scans and allows users to click an entry to see detailed plant results.

steps.description: Navigate to Explore View after having performed several plant scans
Confirm scan history is listed with date and summary
Select a history entry
Verify the detailed plant result page is displayed for the selected scan

title: Profile View displays user info and dark mode toggle
description: Ensure user profile details, collection statistics, and dark mode toggle are present and functional in Profile View.

steps.description: Navigate to Profile View
Verify user profile information is shown correctly
Check collection statistics are accurate and visible
Toggle the dark mode setting
Verify UI theme switches between light and dark modes accordingly

title: Offline mode disables camera/upload and shows notification
description: Test that when offline, the app disables camera and upload functions, informs the user, but allows viewing previously cached data.

steps.description: Simulate offline network state
Navigate to Home View
Verify camera capture and upload buttons are disabled or hidden
Check an offline notification or message is displayed
Navigate to Collection or Explore View
Confirm that cached plant collection and scan history data are accessible and displayed

title: Responsive design across device types and screen sizes
description: Verify that the application UI adapts correctly and remains usable on multiple screen sizes and devices.

steps.description: Load the app on desktop, tablet, and mobile viewport sizes
Confirm UI elements resize and reposition properly without overflow or truncation
Check navigation and buttons remain fully functional on all device configurations

title: Loading and progress states during AI analysis
description: Test that the analyzing/loading screen shows appropriate animations, rotating messages, and progress indicators during plant image processing.

steps.description: Initiate plant identification or diagnosis by submitting an image
Verify the full-screen analyzing screen with rotating loading messages appears
Confirm presence of animated progress indicators
Ensure the UI transitions smoothly from analyzing to result view

title: UI handles image loading errors gracefully
description: Ensure that if plant images or thumbnails fail to load in any view, the UI handles errors without breaking layout and shows placeholders or error indicators.

steps.description: Modify image URL to a broken or invalid path
Load views with plant images such as Collection or Result View
Check that a placeholder or error icon appears instead of broken images
Ensure layout remains consistent and no crashes occur
